datasets.source: Zachary karate club standard 78-edge social network
datasets.source_identity: Zachary karate club graph, 34 nodes, standard 78-edge 1-indexed edge list; NetworkX documents this as derived from Zachary 1977 Table 3/Table 1 split labels.
datasets.hash_material: canonical JSON of dataset name, 1-indexed node convention, node count, edge count, and sorted standard 78-edge list
datasets.notes: Small frozen public graph task used for graph-runner plumbing and baseline policy validation; not a broad graph benchmark by itself.
